assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types in the priority matrix: End of Support (EoS) Warning, Security Patch Available, Auto-upgrade Scheduled, and New Version Available

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Security patches are assigned MEDIUM priority (🟡), not highest. End of Support warnings and Deprecated API usage are assigned HIGH priority (🔴), making them higher than security patches

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states EoS warnings are HIGH priority requiring 'Plan upgrade immediately' with 30-60 day timeline, and provides specific action items including planning upgrades before support ends

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed decision matrix and actions for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications, including options to allow, defer, or accelerate, which constitutes a pre-upgrade checklist approach

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response specifically addresses expedited upgrades for security patches based on CVE severity (CRITICAL within 7 days, HIGH within 14 days) and mentions accelerated patching option

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes 'New Version Available' as LOW priority (🟢) with 'No deadline' and explicitly states 'No immediate action required' while recommending filing in planning backlog

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes specific section on 'Proactive Monitoring Setup' with detailed gcloud commands for creating Pub/Sub topics and configuring Cloud Monitoring alerting for cluster events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions reviewing GKE release notes for CVE details and includes gcloud command to get server config, and recommends reviewing release notes for new features/changes
